flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cuesta College rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cuesta College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cuesta College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cuesta College rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 (7.1k → 9.8k).
